company.name: Veyra Technologies
company.tagline: Cloud infrastructure, engineered for emerging markets.
company.mission: We build fast, affordable and reliable cloud infrastructure so that builders in under-served regions can ship world-class products without paying a premium for distance.
history: Veyra Technologies was founded in 2019 in Tashkent by three engineers who were tired of routing their workloads through data centres thousands of kilometres away. What started as a single rack of servers and a promise of "sub-20-millisecond latency for Central Asia" has grown into a regional cloud provider trusted by startups, banks and government platforms.

From the beginning, the company focused on one idea: developers in emerging markets should not have to choose between price, speed and reliability. By placing compute close to the users who need it and pairing it with a developer experience that feels familiar, Veyra removed the friction that pushed local teams onto distant, expensive platforms.

Today Veyra operates points of presence across five cities on three continents, serves more than 4,200 active customers, and keeps a measured 99.98% control-plane uptime. The team has grown from 3 founders to over 140 engineers, designers and support specialists, while keeping the original engineering culture intact.

offices.blurb: Our founding office and primary engineering hub, home to the platform, networking and support teams.

offices.address: One Central, World Trade Centre, Dubai
offices.blurb: Commercial headquarters for the Middle East and North Africa, plus a low-latency edge location.
Our gateway to South-East Asian markets and the anchor of the Asia-Pacific availability region.
Hosts EU-resident workloads and leads our GDPR and ISO compliance programme.
Our newest region, opened to support customers expanding into North America.

timeline.detail: First production rack goes live; 12 early-access customers onboarded.
Reached 500 active customers and closed a seed funding round.
Edge points of presence added; revenue grew 3.4x year over year.
Crossed 2,000 customers and shipped the Edge CDN product.
Achieved ISO 27001 certification and launched the Observability Suite.
Surpassed 4,000 customers; team grew past 140 people.
Raised a Series B round and rebuilt the developer console from the ground up.

services.name: Cloud Compute
services.summary: On-demand virtual machines and autoscaling container clusters billed by the second.
services.details: Spin up VMs in under 30 seconds across any of our five regions. Choose general-purpose, compute-optimised or memory-optimised shapes, attach NVMe storage, and let our autoscaler match capacity to real traffic.

services.name: Managed Databases
services.summary: Fully managed PostgreSQL, MySQL and Redis with automated backups and failover.
services.details: We handle patching, replication and point-in-time recovery so your team never carries a pager for the database. High-availability clusters fail over in seconds with no data loss.

services.name: Edge CDN
services.summary: A content and API delivery network with caching at every regional point of presence.
services.details: Serve static assets and cache API responses from the location closest to each visitor. Includes free TLS certificates, smart compression and real-time cache analytics.

services.name: DevOps & Migration
services.summary: Hands-on help moving your workloads to Veyra with zero-downtime cutovers.
services.details: Our solutions engineers design your architecture, write the infrastructure-as-code, and run the migration alongside your team. Most customers are fully migrated within two weeks.

services.name: Observability Suite
services.summary: Metrics, logs and traces in one place, with alerting that reaches your team where they are.
services.details: Collect metrics, structured logs and distributed traces with a single agent. Build dashboards, set SLO-based alerts and route notifications to email, Slack or Telegram.

services.name: Security & Compliance
services.summary: Managed firewalls, DDoS protection and audit-ready compliance reporting.
services.details: Protect every workload with managed network firewalls, automatic DDoS mitigation and continuous vulnerability scanning. Download SOC 2 and ISO 27001 evidence on demand.

awards.title: Best Developer Experience
awards.note: Voted by attending engineers for the new console.

awards.title: Top 50 Startups to Watch
awards.note: Listed among the fastest-growing infrastructure firms.

awards.title: ISO 27001 Certification
awards.note: Independent certification of our information security.

awards.title: Sustainability in Tech
awards.note: For powering the Singapore region on renewable energy.

testimonials.name: Madina Karimova
testimonials.quote: Migrating our payments platform to Veyra cut our median API latency in half. The migration team felt like an extension of our own.

testimonials.name: Daniyar Iskakov
testimonials.quote: The managed databases just work. We have not lost a minute of sleep over failover since we switched two years ago.

testimonials.name: Lena Hoffmann
testimonials.quote: Pricing is transparent and the observability suite replaced three separate tools for us. Support replies in minutes, not days.

testimonials.name: Arman Toleu
testimonials.quote: Being able to keep student data inside our region while still scaling globally was the deciding factor. Veyra made it painless.

team.name: Ravshan Yusupov
team.bio: Ravshan leads strategy and partnerships. Before Veyra he spent eight years building telecom billing systems across Central Asia.

team.name: Aigerim Sultanova
team.bio: Aigerim architects the platform. She is a distributed-systems engineer who previously scaled infrastructure at a regional ride-hailing company.

team.name: Timur Abdullaev
team.bio: Timur runs operations and finance, keeping the company disciplined as it grows across continents.

team.name: Nilufar Rashidova
team.bio: Nilufar leads the engineering organisation and owns delivery across the compute and database teams.

team.name: Sergey Volkov
team.bio: Sergey designs the global backbone and edge network that keeps Veyra fast everywhere.

team.name: Dilnoza Ergasheva
team.bio: Dilnoza makes sure every customer is supported from first migration to long-term scale.
